name: @devdigest/runner
description: DevDigest CI agent-runner — the engine-backed job that runs inside GitHub Actions. Reads the exported agent manifest, fetches the PR diff via a minimal GitHub REST client, runs the SAME review engine (@devdigest/reviewer-core) used locally (grounding gate included), posts results, and writes a devdigest-result.json artifact. Esbuild-bundled to a COMMITTED dist/runner.mjs so the exported workflow needs no npm install step and no marketplace action.
